title: cercidiflorales
intro: The Cercidiflorales is an order of flowering plants, characterized by its unique floral structure and reproductive characteristics. This order includes a diverse range of families, such as Orchidaceae, which comprises orchids with modified leaves called bracts, and Euphorbiaceae, a family of plants often known for their milky sap. Another notable family within the Cercidiflorales is Cyperaceae, which includes sedges and rushes. The Cercidiflorales order encompasses a wide variety of plant species, each with distinct adaptations and growth habits.

families.family_desc: Cercidiphyllaceae is a family of flowering plants in the order Cercidiphyllales, commonly known as the katsura family.
